title: Seplat Energy Strengthens Ties with Edo State Government for Sustainable Community Engagement - FinancialEDGE
description: L-R: Director, External Affairs and Social Performance, Seplat Energy Plc, Mrs. Chioma Yvonne Afe; Edo State Commissioner for Mining and Energy – Oil & Gas, Honorable Andrew Ijegbai; and Permanent Secretary of the Ministry, Mrs. Ese Martina Omoruyi, when Afe paid a courtesy visit to Honorable Ijegbai at the Ministry to strengthen collaboration between Seplat
html: L-R: Director, External Affairs and Social Performance, Seplat Energy Plc, Mrs. Chioma Yvonne Afe; Edo State Commissioner for Mining and Energy – Oil & Gas, Honorable Andrew Ijegbai; and Permanent Secretary of the Ministry, Mrs. Ese Martina Omoruyi, when Afe paid a courtesy visit to Honorable Ijegbai at the Ministry to strengthen collaboration between Seplat Energy and the Edo State Government, and foster sustainable community engagement in Benin … on Monday
